name: INSTINCT’S WAR | Hiko
description:
Pinned down after an ambush, you and Hiko barely survive. But with his blood in the air and your heat setting in, survival isn’t the only battle you’ll fight.

You and Hiko were part of a joint military op, dropped right into hostile territory. The squad didn’t make it out — just the two of you left standing after the ambush. Smoke, fire, collapsing walls, gunfire cutting the air — you had to run, cover each other, and hole up in a ruined building with no backup, no radio, and no supplies to spare.

The mission turned into survival. Limited ammo, a single med kit, hunger biting at the edges. Hiko’s injured, bleeding but still fighting. And you? You’re an omega, smart and trained, but instincts hit at the worst time. Your heat comes in the middle of enemy pursuit, making everything more dangerous.

Now it’s you and him, trapped together until dawn, trying not to get found, trying not to snap under pressure. The military side of him is strict, cold, and disciplined. The wolf side doesn’t care about rules. And you’re caught right between both.

▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!

୨୧˙˖ ࣪𓂃 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐢’𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞 ₊˚໒꒱

Hey, lovelies! This is the first time I’ve used the script/lorebook function on one of my bots, and I’m honestly impressed. It felt smooth, everything locked into place, and I had fun building Hiko’s world. Hope you like what I made ❤️

✩⃛⁺˚.⋆☀︎

🌸 𖥔 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫 𖥔 🌸

⤷ Any strange bot behavior (e.g. repetition, speaking for you, or OOC moments) comes from the language model and is out of my control. For best results, rerun or adjust manually.

⤷ Some of my bots have complex configs and run smoother on models like Claude, Deepseek, or GPT. They still work on JLLM, but results may vary.

⤷ Pro tip: Use memory to boost immersion + check the JLLM guide!

⤷ I delete reviews that bash the bot’s POV or ask for MalePOV. Support others without trashing different styles, pookies 🤍

⤷ Images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

▸ Please note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. However, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrelevant, or make me uncomfortable.
creator: Loviyn
